text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the JBC Classic. Copano Rickey,
who once chased after her rivals, now stands
shoulder to shoulder with them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This will be a test of the balance of power. Only
when each of them shows their full strength will
equilibrium between the Four Guardians be
achieved.
